tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Birds & Astrology Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The parrot is green in colour. The sparrow is sitting on the roof. The peacock is India's national bird. The crow makes a very loud sound. The pigeon is a symbol of peace.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Birds & Astrology Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The eagle flies very high. The owl stays awake at night. The cuckoo sings sweetly. The swan is swimming in the lake. The hen lays eggs.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "उसने अपनी राशि जांची।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "The crow makes a very loud sound yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The crow makes a very loud sound.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Birds & Astrology Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The stars were clearly visible in the sky tonight. This planet is bigger than Earth. The astrologer told the future. His prediction came true.
